top_findings.summary: The skill requests permission to execute arbitrary Bash commands and perform unrestricted file system operations (Read, Write, Glob, Grep) which are excessive for its stated purpose of validating shipping terms and compliance. While accessing external APIs (WebFetch) for trade data and customs information is reasonable, the ability to run arbitrary system commands and access any file on the system creates unnecessary security risks and could be used for actions unrelated to compliance checking, such as modifying system files or executing malicious payloads. A more restricted permission set limited to API calls and specific data file access would be sufficient for the described capabilities.
